name: justinj-industries-website
description: Lightweight QA toolchain for JustinJ Industries static website

scripts.check:a11y: start-server-and-test serve http://127.0.0.1:8080 "pa11y http://127.0.0.1:8080 --standard WCAG2AA --timeout 120000 && pa11y http://127.0.0.1:8080/government-buyers.html --standard WCAG2AA --timeout 120000 && pa11y http://127.0.0.1:8080/capability-statement.html --standard WCAG2AA --timeout 120000"
scripts.check: npm run check:html && npm run check:links && npm run check:a11y && npm run check:format
